description: TTM revenue divided by equity value on the most recent balance sheet.
Debt divided by TTM operating expenses.
Number of fully diluted shares the ticker has divided by the current number of shares issued.
TTM dividends issued divided by the market capitalization.
Average value of total assets on the balance sheet in the past year divided by the average value of equity on the balance sheet in the past year.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to debt five years ago. If infinite or NA, assume fiveyr_debtusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to TTM earnings before interest and taxes 5 years ago. If infinite or NA, assume fiveyr_ebitusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to TTM revenue 5 years ago. If infinite or NA, assume fiveyr_rev_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to debt four years ago. If infinite or NA, assume fouryr_debtusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to TTM earnings before interest and taxes 4 years ago. If infinite or NA, assume fouryr_ebitusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to TTM revenue 4 years ago. If infinite or NA, assume fouryr_rev_growth value.
TTM interest expense as a percentage of TTM operating expenses.
Number of shares outstanding multiplied by the close price.
The aforementioned price/common earnings ratio, divided by the year-over-year growth in trailing twelve-month net income to common shareholders.
The percent change in the 100-day simple moving average market capitalization relative to the 200-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The percent change in the current market capitalization relative to the 100-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The percent change in the current market capitalization relative to the 10-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The percent change in the current market capitalization relative to the 200-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The percent change in the 20-day simple moving average market capitalization relative to the 50-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The percent change in the current market capitalization relative to the 20-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The percent change in the 50-day simple moving average market capitalization relative to the 100-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The percent change in the current market capitalization relative to the 50-day simple moving average of the market capitalization.
The market capitalization divided by the trailing twelve months (TTM) net income attributable to common shareholders (so net income minus preferred dividends and earnings).
Market capitalization divided by TTM operating cash flow.
Market capitalization divided by TTM revenue.

The percent change in the ticker's market capitalization relative to its 100-day simple moving average divided by the percent change in the market capitalization of the ticker relative to the 100-day simple moving average of the sector's market capitalization. Basically, a summary of how the ticker has performed relative to its sector performance over the past 100 days.

The percent change in the ticker's market capitalization relative to its 200-day simple moving average divided by the percent change in the market capitalization of the ticker relative to the 200-day simple moving average of the sector's market capitalization. Basically, a summary of how the ticker has performed relative to its sector performance over the past 200 days.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to debt 2 quarters prior. If infinite or NA, assume qq_debtusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to TTM earnings before interest and taxes 2 quarters prior. If infinite or NA, assume qq_ebitusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to TTM revenue 2 quarters prior. If infinite or NA, assume qq_rev_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to debt three quarters prior. If infinite or NA, assume q2q_debtusd_growth value.

The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to TTM earnings before interest and taxes three quarters prior. If infinite or NA, assume q2q_ebitusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to TTM revenue 3 quarters prior. If infinite or NA, assume q2q_rev_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to the preceding quarter's debt. If infinite or NA, assume median value of all records that day in qq_debtusd_growth.

The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to the preceding quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes. If infinite, assume median value of all records that day in qq_ebitusd_growth.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to the preceding quarter's TTM revenue. If infinite, assume median value of all records that day in qq_rev_growth.
TTM share-based compensation as a percentage of TTM operating expenses.

The average percent change in the market capitalization of tickers in the sector the given ticker is in relative to the 100-day simple moving average of the market capitalization of the given sector. In sum, an assessment of how the sector as a whole the ticker is in is trending relative to its 100-day simple moving average.

The average percent change in the market capitalization of tickers in the sector the given ticker is in relative to the 200-day simple moving average of the market capitalization of the given sector. In sum, an assessment of how the sector as a whole the ticker is in is trending relative to its 200-day simple moving average.
TTM sales, general, and administrative expense as a percentage of TTM operating expenses.
The sum of TTM net share issuance, TTM dividends issued, and TTM change in liabilities divided by the market capitalization.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to debt 3 years ago. If infinite or NA, assume threeyr_debtusd_growth value.

The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to TTM earnings before interest and taxes three years ago. If infinite or NA, assume threeyr_ebitusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to TTM revenue three years ago. If infinite or NA, assume threeyr_rev_growth value.
Unix timestamp when data is received.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to debt 2 years ago. If infinite or NA, assume twoyr_debtusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to TTM earnings before interest and taxes two years ago. If infinite or NA, assume twoyr_ebitusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to TTM revenue two years ago. If infinite or NA, assume twoyr_rev_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's debt relative to debt one year ago. If infinite or NA, assume q3q_debtusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM earnings before interest and taxes relative to TTM earnings before interest and taxes one year ago. If infinite or NA, assume q3q_ebitusd_growth value.
The growth of the most recent quarter's TTM revenue relative to TTM revenue 1 year ago. If infinite or NA, assume q3q_rev_growth value.
